title: nepeta bellevii
intro: Nepeta bellevii, also known as Large-leaf Catmint or Nepeta, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nepeta bellevii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
